code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{useCart}from'../context/CartContext';import toast from'react-hot-toast';import'./ProductCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProductCard=_ref=>{let product=_ref.product;const _useCart=useCart(),addToCart=_useCart.addToCart;const handleAddToCart=e=>{e.preventDefault();addToCart(product,1);toast.success("".concat(product.name," added to cart!"));};const renderStars=rating=>'★'.repeat(Math.round(rating))+'☆'.repeat(5-Math.round(rating));return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/products/".concat(product._id),className:"product-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"product-image",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:product.image,alt:product.name}),product.stock===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"out-of-stock",children:"Out of Stock"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"product-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"product-category",children:product.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"product-name",children:product.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"product-rating",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stars",children:renderStars(product.rating)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"review-count",children:["(",product.numReviews,")"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"product-footer",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"product-price",children:["\u20B9",product.price.toLocaleString()]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-primary add-cart-btn",onClick:handleAddToCart,disabled:product.stock===0,children:"Add to Cart"})]})]})]});};export default ProductCard;
